Box Breathing

Take a moment
for yourself.

A guided session with a real human voice to walk you through one round of box breathing.

Sit upright in a chair. Rest your hands on your knees. You will inhale through your nose and exhale through your mouth.

Guided session
Getting ready…
Listen to the guide and follow along.

Well done.

You showed up for yourself. Your nervous system is calmer. Carry this feeling with you.
